name: Skaven (Clan Eshin)
source: Mordheim rulebook Part 2 - Warbands, fetched from https://www.broheim.net/downloads/rules/Mordheim%20-%20Part%202%20-%20Warbands.pdf on 2026-07-03. Cross-check against your own rulebook/errata (2005 Errata + Annual) before relying on it.

heroSlots.notes: 60 gc. Leader (6"). Perfect Killer: an extra -1 armour-save modifier to all wounds he inflicts (shooting and close combat). statMaximums null: fill Skaven maximums from the Maximum Profile table.
45 gc, 0-1. Wizard: uses the Magic of the Horned Rat (see Magic).
20 gc, 0-2. Use the Skaven Henchmen equipment list.

henchmenTypes.notes: 20 gc, any number. statMaximums null: fill from the Maximum Profile table.
15 gc, any number. Animals: do not gain experience. No weapons/armour.
210 gc, 0-1. Fear. Stupidity unless a Skaven Hero is within 6". Large Target. Does not gain experience. No weapons/armour. (isAnimal=true used as the 'no experience' flag.)

exclusiveEquipment.name: Weeping Blades
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: Range: Close Combat; Strength: as user. Pair: +1 attack. Venomous: permanently coated in black lotus (no extra poison may be applied). Parry: may parry as a sword.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Fighting Claws
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: Range: Close Combat; Strength: as user. Pair: +1 attack. Climb: +1 Initiative on Climbing tests. Parry: may parry and re-roll a failed attempt once (as sword+buckler). Cumbersome: no other weapons may be used the entire battle.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Blowpipe
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: Range 8"; Strength 1; +1 save modifier. Poison: a natural 6 to hit auto-wounds (as Black Lotus); cannot cause criticals; even models with no save get a 6+. Stealthy: may fire while hidden; target may take an Initiative test to spot the shooter.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Warplock pistol
exclusiveEquipment.restriction: Rare 11, Skaven only (70 gc for a brace)
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: Range 8"; Strength 5; -3 save modifier. Fires every other turn.

exclusiveEquipment.name: Throwing stars (shuriken)
exclusiveEquipment.rulesText: TODO: verify profile/special rules vs rulebook.

specialRules: Skaven (Clan Eshin). Skaven Heroes may use their own Special skill list instead of a standard one (skillLists id 'skaven'): Black Hunger (+1A and +D3" move for the turn, then D3 S3 hits with no save); Tail Fighting (extra attack with shield/knife/sword via the tail, or +1 armour save); Wall Runner (no Initiative test to climb); Infiltration (deploy after the enemy, anywhere out of sight and >12" from foes); Art of Silent Death (fight bare-pawed with no penalty as two weapons, +1A, and cause criticals on a to-wound 5-6; with Fighting Claws gives +2A). Highest warband cap in the core game: max 20 models. Min warband size 3. | Human models use the standard human Maximum Profile (M4 WS6 BS6 S4 T4 W3 I6 A4 Ld9) from the core-rules Maximum Profile table — verify. Non-human models are left null; fill their racial maximums from that same table. | TODO: verify each Hero's skill-table access (Combat/Shooting/Academic/Strength/Speed) against the rulebook — the checkmark columns were ambiguous in the source PDF extraction.
